3172990.name: Get Baz Home
3172990.description:
Bizarre, tough little platformer. Help Get Baz Home after a night out and a dodgy kebab, be careful though - the path is far from straightforward. A series of warped, twisted, and disjointed levels stand between Baz and his gaff.

In a new twist on the retro platformer format, each level is rendered with its own unique effect - distorting the level in unusual ways, offering a unique challenge to players.

Complete 4 worlds each with 7 challenging levels and bosses. Dodge fireballs and jump off walls to reach the exit.

The game is easily moddable - each level consists of an image for the layout and a shader which handles the distortion effect.
